name: cost-tracker-for-simpli
description: The all-in monthly cost of running your Simpli Studio content, not just your Simpli bill: videos, images, and animations, plus the plan video-minute cap, your fal / ElevenLabs / Fish.audio key spend, and fixed tools. Opens a friendly setup walkthrough and a plug-and-play cost dashboard. Unofficial, community-made; not affiliated with Simpli Studio.
